_description: Post-tool hooks: quality gate + auto-format after file writes/edits

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$"; then if command -v biome &>/dev/null; then biome check --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v prettier &>/dev/null; then prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.py$"; then if command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi'
hooks.description: Auto-format TypeScript/Python files after write/edit (Biome, Prettier, or Ruff)

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$" && [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$"; then if grep -q "console\.log" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[post-tool] Warning: console.log found in $FILE"; fi; fi'
hooks.description: Warn about console.log statements in committed files

hooks.command: bash -c 'OUTPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT"; if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -qE "(https://github.com/[^/]+/[^/]+/pull/[0-9]+)"; then PR_URL=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -oE "https://github.com/[^/]+/[^/]+/pull/[0-9]+" | head -1); echo "[post-tool] PR created: $PR_URL — review with: gh pr view --web $PR_URL"; fi'
hooks.description: Log PR URL after gh pr create commands
